reviewText: Amazing sound quality! The bass is deep and clear. Battery lasts 28 hours easily. Very comfortable for long listening sessions.
Decent earphones for the price. Sound is ok but not exceptional. Build feels a bit cheap.
Battery died after 6 months. Very disappointed with the durability. Not worth the money.
Crystal clear audio and great noise cancellation. The price is a bit high but worth every penny.
Good product overall. Camera quality on the connected app is average. Delivery was fast.
Comfortable fit, good sound. Nothing special but solid value for the price.
